'''âj-ch-m-t''' ('''kajachmetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lactolate|lactolate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lactolate|lactolate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-ch-m-t
|-
! Lemma
| kajachmetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thijachmetoko || jijachmetoko || shijachmetoko || kijachmetoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthujachmetoko || jujujachmetoko || shushujachmetoko || kukujachmetoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thujachmetoko || jujachmetoko || shujachmetoko || kujachmetoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thujachmetoko || jujachmetoko || shujachmetoko || kujachmetoko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thejachmetoko || jejachmetoko || shejachmetoko || kejachmetoko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothojachmetoko || jojojachmetoko || shoshojachmetoko || kokojachmetoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thojachmetoko || jojachmetoko || shojachmetoko || kojachmetoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thojachmetoko || jojachmetoko || shojachmetoko || kojachmetoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || jachmetoko || jachmetoko || jachmetoko || jachmetoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || jachmetoko || jachmetoko || jachmetoko || jachmetoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || jachmetoko || jachmetoko || jachmetoko || jachmetoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || jachmetoko || jachmetoko || jachmetoko || jachmetoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thĂŠjachmetoko || jĂŠjachmetoko || shĂŠjachmetoko || kĂŠjachmetoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathajachmetoko || jajajachmetoko || shashajachmetoko || kakajachmetoko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thajachmetoko || jajachmetoko || shajachmetoko || kajachmetoko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thajachmetoko || jajachmetoko || shajachmetoko || kajachmetoko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
